mapper.select:
SELECT bpuf.user_id, bpuf.author_time, bpuf.author_user author, bpgr.group_id, bpuf.permission_type, bpuf.permission_id, bo.org_code, bo.org_name, bpr.name, bpr.parent_id, bpr.resource_desc, bpr.url, bpr.type, bpr.resource_type, bpr.belong, bpr.bussiness_system, bpr.permission_group, bpr.control_display, bpr.state, bpr.leaf_flag, bpr.icon, bpr.number, bpr.hidden, bpr.target, bpr.component, bpr.keep_alive, bpr.redirect, bpr.menu_order, bpr.iframe_path, bpr.source, bpr.operations, bpr.token, bpr.platform_id FROM base_permission_user_func bpuf INNER JOIN base_permission_group_resource bpgr ON bpuf.permission_id = bpgr.permission_id AND bpuf.group_id = bpgr.group_id INNER JOIN base_permission_resource bpr ON bpr.id = bpgr.permission_id INNER JOIN base_organization bo ON bo.id = bpgr.group_id WHERE 1 = 1 AND bpuf.permission_type = #{permissionType} AND bpuf.`state` = #{state} AND bpuf.user_id = #{userId} AND bpgr.group_id = #{groupId} AND bpr.`state` = #{state} AND bpr.`control_display` = #{controlDisplay} and bpr.name like CONCAT('%',#{resourceName},'%')
and bpr.resource_type=#{resourceType} and bpr.belong=#{belong} and bpr.type=#{type} and bpr.parent_id=#{parentId} and bpgr.`state`=1 and bpr.`state`=1 group by bpuf.permission_id order by bpr.menu_order asc

SELECT bpuf.user_id, bpuf.author_time, bpuf.author_user author, bpuf.permission_type, bpuf.permission_id, bpuf.`state`, bpuf.group_id, bo.org_code, bo.org_name, ( CASE WHEN bo.org_type = 1 THEN '全局' WHEN bo.org_type = 2 THEN '集团' WHEN bo.org_type = 3 THEN '业务单元' WHEN bo.org_type = 4 THEN '部门' ELSE '' END ) org_type, ( CASE WHEN bo.org_type = 4 THEN bo.parent_bu_id ELSE bo.parent_id END ) parent_id FROM base_permission_user_func bpuf INNER JOIN base_organization bo ON bo.id = bpuf.permission_id WHERE 1 = 1 AND bo.org_type!=2 AND bpuf.permission_type = #{permissionType} AND bpuf.`state` = #{state} AND bpuf.user_id = #{userId} AND bpuf.group_id = #{groupId} and bo.org_name like CONCAT('%',#{orgName},'%') group by bpuf.permission_id

SELECT bprf.permission_type, bprf.permission_id, bprf.group_id FROM base_permission_user_role bpur INNER JOIN base_permission_role_func bprf ON bpur.role_id = bprf.role_id AND bpur.group_id = bprf.group_id AND bpur.user_id = #{userId} and bpur.group_id = #{groupId} and bpur.`state` = 1 and bprf.`state` = 1

SELECT bpuf.permission_type, bpuf.permission_id, bpuf.group_id FROM base_permission_user_func bpuf
WHERE bpuf.user_id = #{userId} and bpuf.group_id = #{groupId} and bpuf.`state` = 1

SELECT tmp.permission_id org_id, tmp.group_id FROM (SELECT 'user' type, bpuf.permission_id, bpuf.group_id, ( CASE WHEN bpgp.param_value = '[{"name":"是","select":"0"},{"name":"否","select":"1"}]' THEN 'role' WHEN bpgp.param_value = '[{"name":"是","select":"1"},{"name":"否","select":"0"}]' THEN 'user' ELSE 'role' END ) groupType FROM base_permission_user_func bpuf INNER JOIN base_permission_group_param bpgp ON bpuf.group_id = bpgp.group_id AND bpuf.permission_type = 'org' WHERE bpuf.user_id = #{userId} UNION ALL SELECT 'role' type, bprf.permission_id, bprf.group_id, ( CASE WHEN bpgp.param_value = '[{"name":"是","select":"0"},{"name":"否","select":"1"}]' THEN 'role' WHEN bpgp.param_value = '[{"name":"是","select":"1"},{"name":"否","select":"0"}]' THEN 'user' ELSE 'role' END ) groupType FROM base_permission_user_role bpur INNER JOIN base_permission_role_func bprf ON bpur.role_id = bprf.role_id AND bpur.group_id = bprf.group_id AND bprf.permission_type = 'org' INNER JOIN base_permission_group_param bpgp ON bprf.group_id = bpgp.group_id AND bpur.user_id = #{userId}) tmp WHERE tmp.type = tmp.groupType

SELECT bpuf.permission_id org_id, bpuf.group_id FROM base_permission_user_func bpuf
WHERE bpuf.user_id = #{userId} and bpuf.group_id= #{groupId} AND bpuf.permission_type = 'org' and bpuf.`state`=1

SELECT bprf.permission_id org_id, bprf.group_id FROM base_permission_user_role bpur INNER JOIN base_permission_role_func bprf ON bpur.role_id = bprf.role_id AND bpur.group_id = bprf.group_id AND bprf.permission_type = 'org' AND bpur.user_id = #{userId} and bpur.group_id = #{groupId} and bpur.`state` = 1 and bprf.`state` = 1

update.if:
delete from base_permission_user_func where user_id=#{userId} and group_id=#{groupId} and permission_type='data' and state=1; insert into base_permission_user_func(user_id,permission_type,permission_id,option_permission,group_id,author_user,author_time,state,created_by,created_name,created_date) values
(#{userId},'data',#{item.permissionId},#{item.optionPermission},#{groupId},#{authorUser},#{authorTime},#{state},#{createdBy},#{createdName},#{createdDate})

mapper.update: delete from base_permission_user_role where user_id=#{userId} and group_id=#{groupId} and state=1

update base_permission_user_func
modified_by=#{modifiedBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
modified_name=#{modifiedName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modified_date=#{modifiedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
state=#{state,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where userId=#{userId} and groupId = #{groupId} and state = 0 and state = 1
